biomes.title: Orientation Arcade
biomes.tone_anchor: bright onboarding carnival where game-show cheer hides administrative predation

biomes.title: Throughput Maze
biomes.tone_anchor: industrial middle of the run with cubicle warrens, printer heat, KPI shrines, and workflow machinery

biomes.title: Executive Apex
biomes.tone_anchor: polished upper tier with glass, investor-safe language, and approved harm

usage_notes: Prefer SVG at runtime when possible.
Backgrounds are decorative and should sit behind route, reward, event, recap, and hub chrome.
Use dim or blur overlays to preserve compact mobile readability rather than baking text into art.
Do not rely on background color differences alone to communicate danger or progression.
Choose stronger overlays for recap/event dense copy and lighter overlays for route/reward surfaces.
